tasks.label: Build: Container Image
tasks.detail: Build the cgroups-v2-checker container image with Podman

tasks.label: Push: Container Image
tasks.detail: Push the container image to Quay.io

tasks.label: Deploy: OpenShift Apply
tasks.command: oc apply -f openshift/namespace.yaml && oc apply -f openshift/rbac.yaml && oc apply -f openshift/deployment.yaml
tasks.detail: Apply all OpenShift manifests (namespace, RBAC, deployment)

tasks.label: Deploy: Rollout Restart
tasks.command: oc rollout restart deployment/cgroups-v2-checker -n cgroups-v2-checker && oc rollout status deployment/cgroups-v2-checker -n cgroups-v2-checker
tasks.detail: Restart the deployment to pick up the latest image

tasks.label: Build, Push & Deploy
tasks.command: echo '=== Building ===' && podman build -t quay.io/chiaretto/cgroups-v2-checker:latest -f Containerfile . && echo '=== Pushing ===' && podman push quay.io/chiaretto/cgroups-v2-checker:latest && echo '=== Deploying ===' && oc apply -f openshift/namespace.yaml && oc apply -f openshift/rbac.yaml && oc apply -f openshift/deployment.yaml && oc rollout restart deployment/cgroups-v2-checker -n cgroups-v2-checker && oc rollout status deployment/cgroups-v2-checker -n cgroups-v2-checker && echo '=== Done ==='
tasks.detail: Full pipeline: build image, push to Quay.io, deploy to OpenShift

tasks.label: OpenShift: Status
tasks.command:
echo '=== DEPLOYMENTS ===' && oc get deployments -n cgroups-v2-checker -o wide && echo '
=== PODS ===' && oc get pods -n cgroups-v2-checker -o wide && echo '
=== SERVICES ===' && oc get services -n cgroups-v2-checker && echo '
=== ROUTES ===' && oc get routes -n cgroups-v2-checker
tasks.detail: Show status of all OpenShift resources

tasks.label: OpenShift: Logs
tasks.detail: Tail logs from the running deployment

tasks.label: Local: Run Flask Dev Server
tasks.detail: Run the Flask development server locally on port 8080

tasks.label: Git: Status & Diff
tasks.command: echo '=== GIT STATUS ===' && git status && echo '\n=== GIT DIFF ===' && git diff --name-only && echo '\n=== STAGED FILES ===' && git diff --cached --name-only

tasks.label: Git: Add specific files and commit
